TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-plum_uma_robo 2020s

S.FORM: kiya ma asi a rteruci a muse qsiya tleetu micux peni micux sato ma.
S.TRANSL: 那個，然後 要在常溫的水中搓揉，和砂糖攪拌。
That, then you should knead them in lukewarm water, and mix them with sugar.

S.FORM: shaokai qsiya kii de kika hnuun di maanu di a basoun su qsiya kiya di kii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 水燒開後，將水放著冷卻。
Boil the water, and let the water cool down.

S.FORM: posai bo a cuwaqi ume hiya ka qsiya di kiya nanak.
S.TRANSL: 把水倒入梅子那裡，就只有這樣。
Pour the water into where plums are, and that’s it.

S.FORM: qsiya sato kiya sato peni qsiya sato kiya qsiya hnpure su sato kiya cuwaqi ume hiya di tleetu du wa cuwaqun.
S.TRANSL: 就是那糖水..那個糖水...你煮的那糖水，倒在梅子那兒。常溫了，你才倒。
That sugar water...that sugar water...you pour that sugar water you boiled into where plums are. When it’s lukewarm, then you pour it.

S.FORM: kiya da baka di.
rengoi na pucaq nisu ta.
mhedu di wa.
so mhedu baka baka di.
manu di pkeru maha kesaun maha lmamu ricah kesaun maha lmamu ricah han.
ecu nak ecu nak.
ma uxe kii di.
a musa lmamu ricah han.
ma kika so kiya di na bange a maanu di hanzikang hanzikang maanu hanzikang kari seediq di ini ku kela kari seediq.
S.TRANSL: 半個小時...賽德克語半個小時怎麼說？我不知道賽德克的字是哪一個。
Half an hour... what’s the word for half an hour in Seediq? I don’t know the word in Seediq.

S.FORM: uqu nak hanzikang denu uqu nak hanzikang di ho ini ku kela kari seediq.
S.TRANSL: 就說先說hanzikang嗎？我不知道賽德克的話是什麼？
Just say hanzikang for now? I don’t know the word in Seediq.

S.FORM: hanzikang rebuun su timu timu han na kika.
S.TRANSL: Immerse them in salt first for half an hour.

S.FORM: rebuun timu haishi timu.
S.TRANSL: Immerse in salt water or salt?

S.FORM: un ma okosu a pstoyun dungan.
pstoyun di ma kika rebuun su qsiya dungan t rebuun su qsiya tleetu dungan kika kingan rabi.
S.TRANSL: 撈起來後，浸泡在常溫水中一晚。
When they are removed, immerse them in lukewarm water for one night.

S.FORM: kingan rabi rebuun su qsiya tleetu.
S.TRANSL: Immerse them in lukewarm water for one night.

S.FORM: te so kusun do pstoyun su di.
S.TRANSL: The next day, remove them from water.

S.FORM: pstoyun su di ma kika phidoun su saso di peni.
S.TRANSL: 你撈起來以後，放在陰影下陰乾。
After you remove them from water, dry them in the shadow.

S.FORM: phidoun su saso di kika mdengu hari do kika kika temaqun su di.
S.TRANSL: 稍微乾的時候，把它們擊爛。
When they dry a little, you smash them.

S.FORM: temaqun su di ma kika a podaun su toswe.
S.TRANSL: 將他們擊爛後，讓他們脫水。
After you smash them, you dehydrate them.

S.FORM: mntena kana kiya da.
ini purei kiya.
ini purei kiya.
kika nak kiya cuwaqanun di kiya di.
baka di baka di qitaan zikang.
